by
  classical
  refine ⟨fun n => hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) ⊥, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    exact (isStoppingTime_hittingAfter (𝓕 := 𝓕) (X := X) (s := Set.Ici n) (t₀ := ⊥) hX1 hX2 h𝓕)
  · intro n ω
    simpa using (hittingAfter_ne_top (X := X) (s := Set.Ici n) (t₀ := (⊥ : ι)) ω)
  · intro ω
    refine WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff_nat.2 ?_
    intro i
    refine ⟨i, fun j hj => ?_⟩
    have hmono :
        hittingAfter X (Set.Ici (i : ℕ)) (⊥ : ι) ω ≤
          hittingAfter X (Set.Ici (j : ℕ)) (⊥ : ι) ω :=
      hittingAfter_mono_set (X := X) (t₀ := (⊥ : ι)) ω (by
        intro x hx
        exact le_trans (show (i : ℕ) ≤ x from hx) hj)
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (WithTop.coe_lt_top i) hmono

by
  refine ⟨fun n => ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact (isStoppingTime_hittingAfter hX1 hX2 h𝓕 _ _)
  · intro ω
    have hmono : Monotone (fun n : ℕ ↦ hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω) := by
      intro m n hmn
      exact hittingAfter_mono_set (X := X) (a := (⊥ : ι)) (by
        intro x hx
        exact Set.mem_Ici.mpr (le_trans (Nat.cast_le.mpr hmn) (Set.mem_Ici.mp hx))) _
    have hbound :
        ∀ n : ℕ, (n : ι) ≤ (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω).untopA := by
      intro n
      by_cases htop : hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω = ⊤
      · simp [htop]
      · have : (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω).untopA =
            (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω).untop htop := by
          simp [WithTop.untopA_eq_untop, htop]
        have hn :
            (n : ι) ≤ (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω).untop htop :=
          hittingAfter_le_untop_of_mem (X := X) (s := Set.Ici (n : ι)) (a := (⊥ : ι)) htop
            (by simp)
        simpa [this] using hn
    refine WithTop.eq_top_iff_forall_lt.2 ?_
    intro t
    rcases (CompactIccSpace.isCompact_Icc (⊥ : ι) t).exists_isGreatest_image
      (s := Set.Icc (⊥ : ι) t) (f := fun x => x) ?_ with ⟨u, huIcc, huGreat⟩
    · refine ⟨u, ?_⟩
      rcases huIcc with ⟨hu0, hut⟩
      have : ∃ n : ℕ, t < n := exists_nat_gt t
      rcases this with ⟨n, htn⟩
      have : t < hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω := by
        have hnle : (n : ι) ≤ (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω).untopA := hbound n
        have : (t : WithTop ι) < (hittingAfter X (Set.Ici n) (⊥ : ι) ω) := by
          have htn' : (t : ι) < (n : ι) := by simpa using htn
          have : (t : WithTop ι) < (n : WithTop ι) := by simpa using (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.mpr htn')
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (WithTop.coe_le_untopA_iff.mp ?_)
        · exact this
        · exact hnle
      exact this
    · exact Set.nonempty_Icc.2 ⟨bot_le, le_rfl⟩
    · intro x hx
      exact hx.2
